app.name: FloraSmart
app.tagline: Gutera inkunga ababurirzi n'abakorana imbuto hamwe na ikoranabuhanga ryo gutera no gukingura ibumba mu buryo bw'ubuhinga.

landing.featuresSubtitle: Urubuga rwacu ruzwihereye abakiriya, abakorana imbuto, abayobozi b'utudugumu, n'abayobozi b'ibicuruzwa.
landing.feature1Text: Raba ibibengerero by'izuba, ibiro by'amazi, n'umutekano w'ibicuruzwa ukoresheje uburyo bwacu bwo gutanga ibisubizo byihariye.
landing.feature2Text: Hitamwo utuundi kandi uhuze ubukomezi bw'utubindi. Ikoranabuhanga ryacu ribara ubukomezi buhambaye kandi bubangikanya imbuto kugira ngo zisubire imbere.
landing.feature3Text: Fata icyerekezo cy'ibibanza byawe mu buryo bw'ingendo. Andika aho utera, kugenda neza, utegereza ingendo z'ibibera mu gihe cy'ukuri.
landing.contrastText: Niba ushaka kugura igiti cya mbere, gutegura imyambarire y'imbuto ku bintu, gukemura ibicuruzwa mu bumba, cyangwa gukurikirana ibinyabiziga, FloraSmart iragaragara mu buzima bwose bw'akazi.
landing.securityText: Amategeko yose y'akazi arateguwe n'ibikoresho by'umutekano bishingiye ku bimirima kandi akurikirwa n'ingendo z'umutekano mu gihe cy'ukuri.
landing.newsletterTitle: Shakisha Amakuru y'Ibimera mu Bwokere Yawe
landing.newsletterSubtitle: Iyandikishe kugira ngo uronke raporo z'ubujyanama bw'ibimera, amakuru y'ibintu bishya, n'amakuru y'ibimera.
landing.subscribeSuccess: Byagenze neza! Wayiyandikishije mu rutonde rwacu.

auth.loginSubtitle: Injira mu Workspace yawe ya FloraSmart
auth.registerSubtitle: Jya na FloraSmart kugira ngo utangire urugendo rw'ubusarane
auth.verifyOtpSubtitle: Injiza kode y'ibiro 6 yoherejwe kuri imeri yawe
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Andika imeri yawe kugira ngo uronke agahu co guhindura

cart.title: Agacaro kawe k'Igiciro
cart.subtitle: Raba ibintu byawe, hindura igiteranyo, kandi ukomeze ku isuzuma.
cart.emptyText: Ntawagize ibimera cyangwa utubindi mu agacaro.
cart.addMore: Ongeraho {{amount}} byinshi kugira ngo uje kugeza ku buruhuke bwa mbere!

checkout.title: Isuzuma Ryumutekano
checkout.subtitle: Andika amakuru y'ubuntu n'ububiko kugira ngo ujuze igiciro.
checkout.orderFailed: Ntabwo bashoboye gukora order. Ongera ugerageze.
checkout.paymentInitFailed: Ntabwo bashoboye gukora order. Ongera ugerageze.
checkout.inventoryChanged: Ibintu byahindutse. Ongera urebe agacaro kawe.
checkout.phoneRequired: Nomero ya telefone ni yo isabwa.
checkout.sslNotice: Amadenho arindwa na SSL kandi arwego rwa PCI.

airtelMoney.sendingPaymentRequest: Tyohereza ubusabe bwo kwishyura kuri terefone yawe...
airtelMoney.waitingForAuthorization: Tegereza kugirango wemere ubusabe bwo kwishyura kuri terefone yawe...
airtelMoney.paymentCompleted: Kwishyura byagenze neza. Murakoze kubw'itegeko ryanyu.
airtelMoney.paymentExpired: Ubusabe bwo kwishyura burashaje. Ongera utangize ubusabe bushya.
airtelMoney.timeoutMessage: Kwishyura biratinda kuruta uko byari byitewe. Tuzakomeza kugenzura.
airtelMoney.confirmInstruction: Nyamuneka reba terefone yawe maze winjize PIN yawe ya Airtel Money kwemera ubusabe.
airtelMoney.dialPrompt: Kanda *111# cyangwa ufungure porogaramu ya Airtel Money

chatbot.title: Urugariro rw'Ubujyanama
chatbot.subtitle: Baza ku bimera, amazi, uduto, n'ibindi.
chatbot.welcome: Muraho! Ndinkyiza y'ubujyanama bw'ibimera. Nshobora kukugira intumbero iki?

recommendations.title: Ubuyobozi bwa AI bw'Ibimera
recommendations.subtitle: Shakisha ibimera byawe byihariye hishiyemo ibyo ukunda.

book.title: Gutegeka Igaragaza
book.subtitle: Gutegeka igihe hamwe n'umwe mu batabarizi bacu.

gardenPlanner.title: Ipurano ry'Ubusukambimba ry'Akata
gardenPlanner.subtitle: Tegura icyerekezo cy'utudugumu twawe mu buryo bw'ingendo.
gardenPlanner.noPlan: Nta plani y'utudugumu. Tangira ukanda akata!

vaseMatching.title: Utuundi n'Ibimera by'Imbuto
vaseMatching.subtitle: Shakisha utubindi twihariye ku mutima wawe.

browseCatalog.title: Raba Urutonde
browseCatalog.desc: Raba urutonde rwacu rwose rwo ibimera, imbuto, n'utubindi.

aiAdvisor.title: Ubuyobozi bwa AI
aiAdvisor.desc: Shakisha ibimera byawe birinda uburyo bwawe.

careBot.title: Urugariro rw'Ubujyanama
careBot.desc: Baza Flora ku buzima bw'ibimera, amazi, n'ibibazo.

orders.title: Amabarijwe
orders.desc: Raba amabarijwe yawe, kurikirana kugeza, kandi ongera ugure.

profile.title: Umwirondoro
profile.desc: Gukemura akonti yawe, amategeko, n'ibyo ukunda.

adminDashboard.title: Konti y'Umuyobozi
adminDashboard.subtitle: Gukemura ibikorwa vyose, amakuru y'umutekano, amadenho, n'ibikoresho vy'isisteme.
adminDashboard.noData: Nta mabarijwe cyangwa amadenho yarabonetse. Imbonerahamwe izajya yuzuzwa mu gihe amabarijwe ateguwe.

floristDashboard.title: Imbonerahamwe y'Ibimera by'Imbuto
floristDashboard.subtitle: Gukemura imyambarire y'imbuto yihariye, kugenzura utubindi, no kohereza imbuto.
floristDashboard.itemsBelowReorderLimit: Ibintu biri hasi y'urwego rwo kongera gutegura
floristDashboard.noFloralOrdersYet: Nta mabarijwe y'imbuto yarabonetse. Amabarijwe azajya agaragara hano ubwo ateguwe.

toast.reportExportedPdf: Raporo y'amabarijwe y'imbuto yoherejwe nka PDF

gardenerDashboard.title: Imbonerahamwe y'Umusarane
gardenerDashboard.subtitle: Kurikirana ubushyuhe bw'igikamandanda, gukemura amateka y'ibimera, no kurikirana ibikorwa vy'utudugumu.
gardenerDashboard.logNewSpecimenDesc: Andika igintu gishya mu bubiko bw'ibimera.
gardenerDashboard.useFormToLogFirst: Koresha ifishi kugira ngo uandike igintu cyawe cya mbere.

validation.nameRequired: Izina ry'ubwoko bw'igiti ni ryo risabwa.

productDetails.noReviewsSession: Nta vyiyumviro vyongeye mu gihe kino.

validation.reviewRequired: Nyamuneka utange izina ryawe n'amakuru y'icyiyumviro.

productCatalog.browseSubtitle: Raba ibicuruzwa biri mu backend vy'FloraSmart.

orderTracking.trackSubtitle: Kurikirana amabarijwe yawe y'ibimera mu gihe cy'ukuri.
orderTracking.noOrdersDesc: Nta mabarijwe wateje. Raba urutonde rwacu kandi utangure urugendo rwawe!
orderTracking.noOrderTrackingActive: Nta gukurikirana kuri igiciro. Koresha icyegereranyo hejuru cyangwa uhitemo igiciro mu gitabu.
orderTracking.allOrdersSubtitle: Kurikirana kandi gukemura amabarijwe yose y'abakiriya mu gihe cy'ukuri.
orderTracking.searchPlaceholder: Rondera ku igiciro, izina, cyangwa imeri...
orderTracking.noOrdersMatchFilters: Nta mabarijwe afitanye icyegereranyo cyangwa ibishungura.

profilePage.title: Amategeko y'Akonti mu Workspace
profilePage.subtitle: Gukemura amakuru y'akonti yawe kandi uhindure ibyo ukunda ku amakuru.
profilePage.updateSettingsHint: Hindura amategeko y'akonti yawe yo gukoresha.

validation.emailRequired: Aderesi ya imeri ni yo isabwa.
validation.passwordInvalid: Ijambo ry'ibanga nti ryuzuye ibintu vyose bisabwa.

toast.failedToMarkAllRead: Ntibyashobotse kwegereza amakuru yose nko yasomwe.

chatbotPage.title: Urugariro rwa FloraAI
chatbotPage.subtitle: Kugenzura ubuzima bw'ibimera, kureba amateka y'ubujyanama, no gutanga ibibazo hagamoye ubushobozi bw'ibimera.
chatbotPage.promptHint: Kanda icyegereranyo hansi kugira ngo utange ibibazo kuri FloraAI vuba:
chatbotPage.noConversationsYet: Nta biganiro biriho. Tangura uruganiko rushya!

toast.failedToGetResponse: Ntibyashobotse kubona igisubizo cwa FloraAI. Biriko birakoresha ubwoko bw'ibikorwa.

plantRecommendation.title: Ubuyobozi bwa AI bw'Ibimera
plantRecommendation.subtitle: Tegura uburyo bwo gutanga ibikorwa ku burambye ku rumuri, ubujyanama, n'ibintu bw'umugereka.
plantRecommendation.submitCriteriaHint: Tegura ibi bikorwa ku burambye bw'ibikorwa.
plantRecommendation.noResultsBackend: Uburambye nti bwatange amakuru y'ibikorwa ku bihumbi vy'ibintu.
plantRecommendation.fillQuestionnaireHint: Uzuza icyegereranyo kugira ngo utange ibikoresho vy'uburambye.

toast.addedAllToCart: Yongewe {{added}} ku {{total}} ibimera vyahujwe mu agacaro.

bookConsultation.subtitle: Gutegeka igihe hamwe n'umwe mu batabarizi bacu.

validation.dateRequired: Itariki yo gutegura ni yo isabwa.

manageConsultations.subtitle: Raba kandi utubure amakuru y'abakiriya.
manageConsultations.checkBackLater: Ongera uje vuba kubona amakuru mashya.
manageConsultations.acceptToSeeHere: Emera vyigisho birimo gutegura kugira ngo ubibone hano.

adminUserManagement.title: Gukemura Abakorana Imbuto n'Umusarane
adminUserManagement.subtitle: Fungura, hindura, tangura, hagarika, kandi gukemura akonti y'abakozi.
adminUserManagement.searchPlaceholder: Rondera ku izina, imeri, cyangwa telefone...
adminUserManagement.deleteWarning: Iyi mikorashyo ntabwo irashobora kugena. Konti n'ibintu vyose vyihujwe bizasibwa buhoro.

inventoryPage.title: Ubuyobozi bw'Ibikoresho
inventoryPage.subtitle: Kugenzura ibintu mu bubiko, kongera imisozi y'imbuto, no kureba amakuru y'ibikoresho.
inventoryPage.physicalAssetsLedgerHint: Ingano y'ibikoresho, ingendo z'ubusabane, n'ibintu biriho mu buryo bw'uburambye.
inventoryPage.noInventoryRecords: Nta makuru y'ibikoresho yabonetse mu buryo bw'uburambye.
inventoryPage.editListingHint: Hindura urutonde n'ingano y'ibicuruzwa mu buryo bw'uburambye.
inventoryPage.addNewListingHint: Ongeraho urutonde rushya mu bubiko bw'ibicuruzwa.

validation.stockRequired: Igiteranyo mu bubiko ni co cisabwa.

inventoryPage.confirmDelete: Urashaka ko wasiba iki kintu mu bubiko?

analyticsPage.title: Ibiharuro by'Ibimera by'Imbuto
analyticsPage.subtitle: Kugenzura amadenho, guhindura urutonde, no guhindura igiciro gakwiye.

reportsPage.title: Raporo n'Ibikorwa
reportsPage.selectReportFormatHint: Hitamwo ubwoko bwa raporo n'uburyo bw'ibikorwa kugira ngo utangire.

toast.failedToDownload: Ntibyashobotse gukura raporo. Biriko birakoresha uburyo bw'inyuma.

deliveryPage.title: Kugeza n'Amakuru
deliveryPage.subtitle: Kurikirana amakuru y'umukoherezi, inzira, no guhindura uburyo bwo kugeza.
deliveryPage.realTimeRouteMap: Inzira z'ibinyabiziga by'amashanyarazi mu gihe cy'ukuri.

gardenPlannerPage.title: Ipurano ry'Ubusukambimba
gardenPlannerPage.subtitle: Bika amateka mu burambye, gukemura amategeko y'akata, no guhuza ibimera mu buryo bw'igikamandanda.
gardenPlannerPage.gardenPlansHint: Hindura plani cyangwa ufungure plani gushya.
gardenPlannerPage.selectPlantVarietyHint: Hitamwo igiti kiri mu burambye kandi ukande akata kugira ngo ushyireho.
gardenPlannerPage.cellConfigurationHint: Bika amakuru y'akata nka uduto, izuba, n'amakuru mu burambye.
gardenPlannerPage.noNotesSaved: Nta makuru yabitswe kuri aka plani.
gardenPlannerPage.clickToPlaceOrClear: Kanda akata kugira ngo ushyire {{name}}, cyangwa kanda akata kariho kugira ngo ukasibe.
gardenPlannerPage.noPlantsMapped: Nta bimera biriho kuri aka kintu.
gardenPlannerPage.runAiSuggestionsHint: Gukora amategeko ya AI kugira ngo ubone ibikorwa vy'uburambye.

validation.choosePlantFirst: Hitamwo igiti mbere yo kugisumbira mu akata.
validation.noteFieldsRequired: Umutwe w'akazi n'ibisobanuro by'akazi ni yo bisabwa.

securityPage.title: Kugenzura Umutekano n'Inkuru y'Igenzura
securityPage.subtitle: Kugenzura RBAC, kureba inkuru z'umutekano, no kurikirana uburyo bw'kwemeza.
securityPage.customerWorkspaceDesc: Raba ibicuruzwa, ongeraho ibintu mu gatebo, tegeura plani y'utudugumu, reba umwirondoro.
securityPage.floristStudioDesc: Hindura immerere y'amabarijwe, reba ibikoresho, ukemure utubindi.
securityPage.gardenerSandboxDesc: Ongeraho amakuru y'ibimera, gukemura plani, kureba ubushyuhe.
securityPage.systemAdministratorDesc: Ongeraho cyangwa usibe ibintu, reba umutekano, ukemure inkuru.

vaseMatchingPage.title: Igipimo c'Utuundi n'Ibimera by'Imbuto
vaseMatchingPage.subtitle: Koresha uburyo bw'uburambye kugira ngo ugererane ingano y'imbuto, ubujyaro bw'utubindi, n'ubugari bw'inkono.
vaseMatchingPage.submitDimensionsHint: Tegura ingano y'imbuto n'utubindi ku burambye bw'uburambye.
vaseMatchingPage.matchSummaryDetail: Ubujyaro bw'imbuto {{stemLength}}cm, ubujyaro bw'utubindi {{vaseHeight}}cm, ububugari bw'inkono {{openingWidth}}cm.
vaseMatchingPage.runCalibrationHint: Gukora ikigereramano c'uburambye kugira ngo ubone amakuru y'ibikwiye.

validation.dimensionsRequired: Ubujyaro bw'utubindi n'ububugari bw'inkono ni bwo bisabwa.

legalPage.heroSubtitle: Iyizere ryo kuri twe rirakwiye. Nyamuneka usome neza.
legalPage.agreeConsentText: Ukanda Emera, wemeye Politiki y'Ibanga n'Amategeko y'Akazi.
